memoryArtifacts.headline: SIR HUMPHREY
memoryArtifacts.description:
SIR HUMPHREY AUDLEY fought for the House of Lancaster in the War of the
Roses, was captured and beheaded in 1471. He was a descendent of Adam
de ALDITHLEY, Baron Audley of Heleigh. Date of his death …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Humphrey Touchet d'Audley於大約1430年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾時，他的父親James Touchet 5th Baron Audley34歲，母親Eleanor de Holand26歲。他和Elizabeth Courtenay至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1471年5月6日在英國格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年42歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利福可斯波利 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Touchet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Anastasie, Denys, Evest, Minos, Rodolph, Vernice.
French: topographic name for someone who lived by a small grove, from a diminutive of Old French toche ‘grove’.
History: René Touchet from Thorigné-d'Anjou in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie Caillé in Saint-Laurent, Île-de-Montreal, QC, in 1746.

variants.name: Touchette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Armand, Collette, Euclide, Henri, Hilaire, Huguette.
Altered form of French Touchet , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Humphrey Touchet d'Audley was born about 1430, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, James Touchet 5th Baron Audley, was 34 and his mother, Eleanor de Holand, was 26. He had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Elizabeth Courtenay. He died on 6 May 1471, in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 42, and was buried in Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Elizabeth Courtenay. Il est décédé le 6 mai 1471, à Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hatte mit Elizabeth Courtenay mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Mai 1471 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Elizabeth Courtenay. Morì il 6 maggio 1471, nel Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Humphrey Touchet d'Audleyが約1430年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父James Touchet 5th Baron Audleyは34歳，母Eleanor de Holandは26歳であった。彼はElizabeth Courtenayとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1471年5月6日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーで42歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーテウケスブリー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucester: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이 튜케스버이 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Humphrey Touchet d'Audley(이)가 대략 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Touchet 5th Baron Audley(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor de Holand(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Courtenay(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1471년 5월 6일 영국 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이 튜케스버이 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Humphrey Touchet d'Audley nasceu aproximadamente 1430, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, James Touchet 5th Baron Audley, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Holand, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com Elizabeth Courtenay. Ele faleceu em 6 de maio de 1471, em Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucester: тюкесбури эбби, тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Humphrey Touchet d'Audley родился около 1430 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени James Touchet 5th Baron Audley было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Holand, 26. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Elizabeth Courtenay. Он умер 6 мая 1471 г. в местности тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности тюкесбури эбби, тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
